title: liruiw/HPT
abstract:
Heterogeneous Pre-trained Transformer (HPT) as Scalable Policy Learner.

# 🦾 Heterogenous Pre-trained Transformers [ ](https://huggingface.co/liruiw/hpt-base) [ ](LICENSE) [ ](http://arxiv.org/abs/2409.20537) [ ](https://liruiw.github.io/hpt) [ ]() [ ]() [Lirui Wang](https://liruiw.github.io/), [Xinlei Chen](https://xinleic.xyz/), [Jialiang Zhao](https://alanz.info/), [Kaiming He](https://people.csail.mit.edu/kaiming/) Neural Information Processing Systems (Spotlight), 2024 This is a pytorch implementation for pre-training Heterogenous Pre-trained Transformers (HPTs). The pre-training procedure train on mixture of embodiment datasets with a supervised learning objective. The pre-training process can take some time, so we also provide pre-trained checkpoints below. You can find more details on our [project page](https://liruiw.github.io/hpt). An alternative clean implementation of HPT in Hugging Face can also be found [here](https://github.com/liruiw/lerobot/). **TL;DR:** HPT aligns different embodiment to a shared latent space and investigates the scaling behaviors in policy learning. Put a scalable transformer in the middle of your policy and don’t train from scratch! ## ⚙️ Setup 1. Install (old-version) Mujoco ## 🚶 Usage 0. Check out ``quickstart.ipynb`` for how to use the pretrained HPTs. 1. train policies on each environment. Add `+mode=debug` for debugging. 2. for example script. 3. Change ``train.pretrained_dir`` for loading pre-trained trunk transformer. The model can be loaded either from local checkpoint folder or huggingface [repository](https://huggingface.co/liruiw/hpt-xlarge). 4. Run the following scripts for mujoco experiments. Metaworld 20 Task Experiments 5. See [here](experiments/config/config.yaml) for defining and modifying the hyperparameters. 6. We use [wandb](https://wandb.ai/home) to log the training process. ## 🤖 Try this On Your Own Dataset 0. For training, it requires a dataset conversion `convert_dataset` function for packing your own datasets. Check [this](env/realworld) for example. 1. For evaluation, it requ
abstract_zh: 本文提出异构预训练Transformer（HPT），一种可扩展的策略学习器。HPT将不同形态的机器人数据对齐到共享的潜在空间，并研究策略学习中的缩放行为。通过在多种具身数据集上进行监督预训练，HPT能够作为策略的骨干网络，避免从头训练。实验表明，HPT在多个模拟和真实环境任务中取得了优异的性能，验证了其可扩展性和泛化能力。
tldr_zh: HPT通过预训练对齐异构机器人数据，实现策略学习的可扩展性。
cover_zh: 机器人策略也能预训练？HPT让不同形态机器人共享一个大脑

judge.reason: 官方HPT算法，多具身预训练策略，NeurIPS Spotlight，可落地。
